_comment: Species: Ancient Demon Clone (古魔分身) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ancient Demon Clone

canonical.appearance: Demon clone 5 m, body shifts between beast and demon-form, radiates ancient demon power
canonical.size: 5 m adult, 5000 jin; true form spans demon-realms
canonical.behavior: Ancient demon clone; cultivates by absorbing demon-essence; can reform from demon-source
canonical.habitat: Ancient demon territory, demon-aspected forbidden zones
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained ancient demon clone as treasure (canon event)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ancient_demon_clone_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
